step.title: Generate domain layer goals (one per BC)
step.rule: Step 2 must have completed successfully (goal-002 created) before this step executes.
Exactly one goal per BC. phase=domain. depends_on=[goal-002]. Goal IDs are sequential starting from goal-003.
All inputs read from docs/architecture/* files and templates on disk — never from conversation context (G-16).

substep.title: Resolve domain templates
substep.action: Attempt to read language-specific overlay templates first, then fall back to base:
Store resolved templates as DOMAIN_TEMPLATE, CONTEXT_MAP_TEMPLATE, SERVICE_CONTRACTS_TEMPLATE. Record which tier was used for each.
substep.rule: DDD patterns (aggregate roots, VOs, events, ACL) MUST come from resolved templates, not hardcoded in this XML.

substep.title: Read architecture inputs for domain generation
substep.action: Read the following files and extract structured data:

read.extract: Use BC_LIST from Step 0 (already validated). Each BC name maps to aggregates via AGGREGATE_MAP.

For each BC, extract: aggregate roots (### headings under BC section), value objects per aggregate, domain events per aggregate, domain services, repository interface descriptions, read model interface presence, invariants.
For each BC, extract: upstream BCs it depends on, relationship type (ACL, Published Language, Shared Kernel), event contracts, ID VO references.

substep.rule: Single-BC projects skip context-mapping.md reading (D-27). Single-BC goals have no ACL interfaces.

substep.title: Initialize Share type ownership tracker
substep.action: Create an in-memory map SHARE_OWNERSHIP = {} to track which BC's goal owns each Share file.
As BCs are processed in order, the first BC that introduces a shared type claims it. Subsequent BCs reference it but do NOT include it in their deliverables.
Tracked files: contexts/previo/src/DomainEventTrait.php, contexts/previo/src/Exception/DomainException.php, contexts/previo/src/DataType/*.php, contexts/previo/src/Event/*.php
substep.rule: DomainEventTrait and base DomainException are always owned by the FIRST BC processed — they go into task-0 of that BC's goal.

substep.title: Iterate BCs and generate domain goals
substep.action: For each BC in BC_LIST (order from bounded-contexts.md), execute substeps 3.14.4a through 3.14.4i:
Maintain a running GOAL_INDEX starting at 3 (goal-003 is the first domain goal).

substep.title: Extract BC aggregates
substep.action: From domain-model.md, extract for this BC:
substep.field: AGGREGATES — list of aggregate root names (### headings under this BC)
VOS_PER_AGGREGATE — map of aggregate name to list of value object names
EVENTS_PER_AGGREGATE — map of aggregate name to list of domain event names
DOMAIN_SERVICES — list of domain service names (if any span multiple aggregates)
READ_MODEL_INTERFACES — list of read model interfaces (query side, Application layer)
INVARIANTS — per aggregate, the business rules enforced
substep.action: Set AGGREGATE_COUNT = len(AGGREGATES).

substep.title: Extract cross-BC dependencies
substep.action: From context-mapping.md (if multi-BC), extract for this BC:
substep.field: PUBLISHED_EVENTS — list of {event_name, producer_bc, consumer_bcs} where this BC is producer or consumer
FOREIGN_ID_VOS — list of ID value objects for cross-BC references
substep.action: For single-BC projects: UPSTREAM_DEPS=[], PUBLISHED_EVENTS=[], FOREIGN_ID_VOS=[].

substep.title: Collect deliverable file paths
substep.action: Build DELIVERABLES list for this BC:
For Share types introduced by this BC (not already in SHARE_OWNERSHIP):
If this is the FIRST BC processed AND DomainEventTrait not yet in SHARE_OWNERSHIP:
Update SHARE_OWNERSHIP for all newly claimed Share files.

task.name: Shared infrastructure (prerequisite)
task.scope: DomainEventTrait (if owned by this BC), base DomainException (if owned), Share DataTypes introduced by this BC, Share Events produced by this BC, ACL interfaces (cross-BC deps)
task.owns: All contexts/previo/src/ files owned by this BC + contexts/{{BC}}/src/Domain/ACL/*.php
task.rule: If this is NOT the first BC and DomainEventTrait/DomainException are already owned, task-0 still exists for BC-specific Share types and ACL interfaces. If task-0 would be empty (no Share types, no ACL interfaces), skip task-0 and make all aggregate tasks independent.

task.name: Per-aggregate task (parallel)
task.scope: One aggregate root, its VOs, its events, its repo interface, its unit tests

branch.action: Assign domain services to the aggregate task with the strongest dependency, or to task-0 if service spans all aggregates.
Assign read model interfaces to the aggregate task whose query contract they serve.
branch.rule: File-disjoint rule: verify zero overlap between task deliverable sets. If overlap found, move shared file to task-0.

branch.action: Single task — all deliverables in one task.

task.scope: All deliverables for this BC's domain layer

substep.title: Compose acceptance criteria from PD-01..PD-20
substep.action: Build ACCEPTANCE array, filtering PD-01..PD-20 to BC-relevant items:

criteria.item: Aggregate root class has private constructor — verify via PHPStan rule or AST check on contexts/{{BC}}/src/Domain/{{Aggregate}}.php
Aggregate root has at least one named constructor (public static factory method returning self)
All value objects are final class — grep contexts/{{BC}}/src/Domain/ValueObject/ for class without final
Value object constructor validates input, throws DomainException on invalid state — unit test per VO
Value objects implement equals() method — grep VO files for equals
Domain events named in past tense (e.g. {{Aggregate}}Created, not Create{{Aggregate}})
Repository interface has domain-specific methods (findByEmail, nextIdentity), not generic find($id)
Read model interface exists in contexts/{{BC}}/src/Application/ReadModel/, returns DTOs
Zero imports from the Bundle (infrastructure) or Application namespace in Domain files — deptrac or grep check
Unit test for creation via each aggregate's named constructor exists (per aggregate)
Unit tests for each mutation method exist (one per state-changing method on each aggregate)
Event-generation assertion exists per aggregate (each domain event asserted recorded by a test)

DECOMPOSE PER INVARIANT — for EACH invariant/uniqueness/existence rule named in the {{BC}} domain model, emit ONE atomic criterion of the form: "{{Invariant}} invariant — {{Invariant}}Checker domain service enforces it AND a test asserts {{Invariant}}Exception is thrown when violated". Name the checker class (contexts/{{BC}}/src/Domain/Service/) and the exception thrown-test (contexts/{{BC}}/tests/Unit/Domain/) so each is independently greppable. NEVER collapse these into a single 'tests cover invariant violations' line.
Unit tests run green — vendor/bin/phpunit --filter={{BC}}\\Domain passes
PHPStan level 9 passes on Domain namespace — vendor/bin/phpstan analyse contexts/{{BC}}/src/Domain
No Doctrine annotations/attributes on domain objects — grep for @ORM\ and #[ORM\ (must be zero)
Domain services exist for cross-aggregate operations
Cross-BC references use ID value objects, not entity imports
ACL interfaces defined in contexts/{{BC}}/src/Domain/ACL/ for each upstream dependency
DomainEventTrait implemented with collect-only pattern — events not dispatched from aggregate
Shared types live in contexts/previo/src/, not duplicated per BC
Cross-BC event DTOs live in contexts/previo/src/Event/ as Published Language
Aggregate sizing follows one-aggregate-per-transaction — prefer small aggregates referencing by ID

substep.rule: Include conditional criteria only when their condition is true for this BC.
Replace {{BC}} and {{Aggregate}} placeholders with actual BC and aggregate names from discovery.

substep.title: Compose validation commands
substep.action: Build VALIDATE array with CLI commands that verify the domain layer:

commands.cmd: grep -rn 'use App\\{{BC}}\\Bundle\|use App\\{{BC}}\\Application' contexts/{{BC}}/src/Domain/ | grep -v 'Application\\ReadModel' | wc -l (must output 0)

For EACH {{BC}} invariant emit a presence pair (GM-09b/GM-09c): grep -rl 'class {{Invariant}}Checker' contexts/{{BC}}/src/Domain/Service/ (must return ≥1) and grep -rlE '{{Invariant}}(AlreadyInUse|NotFound|Invalid)Exception' contexts/{{BC}}/tests/Unit/Domain/ (must return ≥1)

substep.rule: The PD-09 grep excludes Application\ReadModel imports which are allowed for read model interface references from Domain services. All other Application/Bundle imports are violations.

GM-09b/GM-09c: PD-10 invariant coverage is gated by the per-invariant presence-greps above, NOT by a coverage judgment on a green suite. Emit one PD-10-INV pair per invariant named in the {{BC}} domain model — the same set decomposed into the PD-10-INV acceptance items. A green suite with a missing presence-grep is a FAIL.
Replace {{BC}} with the actual BC namespace name from discovery.

substep.title: Compose context with Investigation Config
substep.action: Build CONTEXT string with these sections:
substep.section: Domain layer for {{BC}}: implements aggregate roots, value objects, domain events, repository interfaces, and unit tests. All domain model details come from docs/architecture/domain-model.md ({{BC}} section). Cross-BC dependencies from docs/architecture/context-mapping.md. DDD aggregate/VO/event/repository-interface contract is catalogue-owned: read code-rules php-symfony/ddd-conventions.md §Domain (+ §Shared, §Cross-BC); the resolved domain template ({{DOMAIN_TEMPLATE tier}}) and context-mapping/ACL template ({{CONTEXT_MAP_TEMPLATE tier}}) carry the project-specific overlay. Do not restate the contract inline.

section.name: fan-out-hints
section.action: Include the fan-out structure from substep 3.14.4d — task-0 (shared) followed by task-1..N (per aggregate) for multi-aggregate BCs, or single task for single-aggregate BCs.
List each task's owned files explicitly. State the depends_on chain.
section.rule: File-disjoint rule: parallel tasks have zero overlapping deliverable files. State this explicitly.

section.name: investigation-config

investigator.name: Unit test runner + invariant coverage
investigator.commands: vendor/bin/phpunit --filter={{BC}}\\Domain; AND for EACH {{BC}} invariant a presence pair: grep -rl 'class {{Invariant}}Checker' contexts/{{BC}}/src/Domain/Service/ and grep -rlE '{{Invariant}}(AlreadyInUse|NotFound|Invalid)Exception' contexts/{{BC}}/tests/Unit/Domain/
investigator.pass: phpunit exits 0 and is non-empty (test count "OK (N tests"/"N tests", NOT "No tests executed!"), all green; AND every invariant presence-grep returns ≥1 line
investigator.fail: Non-zero/empty phpunit run ("No tests executed!", any failure/error), OR any invariant presence-grep returns 0 — an enforced invariant that lacks its Service checker class or its thrown-exception test is a FAIL even when the suite is green (GM-09b: objective gate, never a coverage judgment)

investigator.name: Static analysis
investigator.fail: Type errors, missing return types, incorrect signatures

investigator.name: Layer violation check
investigator.pass: Zero matches for both greps — no infrastructure leakage, no Doctrine annotations
investigator.fail: Bundle (infrastructure) imports or Doctrine annotations found in Domain namespace

investigator.name: DDD convention check
investigator.commands: grep -r 'private function __construct' contexts/{{BC}}/src/Domain/ (must match aggregate count), grep -rn 'final class' contexts/{{BC}}/src/Domain/ValueObject/ (must match VO count), grep -rn 'function equals' contexts/{{BC}}/src/Domain/ValueObject/ (must match VO count)
investigator.pass: Private constructors on all aggregates, final on all VOs, equals() on all VOs
investigator.fail: Missing private constructor, non-final VO, missing equals()

section.rule: Minimum 3 investigators (Unit tests + Static analysis + Layer violation). Investigator 4 added when AGGREGATE_COUNT > 1 or cross-BC deps exist (GM-08).
Each investigator has type, commands, pass/fail criteria (GM-09).

section.name: template-references
section.action: Include references to resolved templates so the executing agent can read DDD patterns:

substep.title: Compose not-in-scope
substep.action: Set NOT_IN_SCOPE to:
substep.value: Doctrine XML mappings, Bundle (infrastructure) repository implementations, command/query handlers, controllers, API endpoints, database migrations, fixtures, E2E tests, Messenger transport config, ACL adapters (Bundle/infrastructure layer) — all handled by subsequent application/infrastructure-phase goals.

substep.title: Inject code rules (apply [CODE-RULE-INJECTION])
substep.action: Bind RULE_FILES = the comma-joined DELIVERABLES paths for this BC (substep 3.14.4c). Bind RULE_PHASE = `domain` (this goal's phase token — pass it VERBATIM).

Run `tmux-cli rules match --files <RULE_FILES> --phase <RULE_PHASE> --json` and apply the spine's `[CODE-RULE-INJECTION]` procedure (<conventions> / <rule-to-goal-injection>): copy each NON-EMPTY `acceptance_line` into the ACCEPTANCE array (3.14.4e); copy each `automated`/`mixed` `validate_cmd` into the VALIDATE array (3.14.4f); add the `Code rules: <ids> — read <paths>` line to CONTEXT (3.14.4g). Empty `rules` ⇒ inject nothing.

MERGE review rules into the EXISTING DDD convention-audit investigator (3.14.4g investigator n=4): append the `review` `validate_cmd`s to its Commands and extend its Fail with "any cited must code-rule violated; should violations reported as findings". Do NOT add a second convention-audit. If investigator n=4 is absent for this BC (its `AGGREGATE_COUNT > 1 or cross-BC deps` condition is false) AND review rules apply, ADD ONE convention-audit — but only within the 2–4 cap; with the 3 mandatory investigators present the ADD lands a 4th slot (legal, no drop needed).
substep.rule: Copy pre-rendered payload fields VERBATIM — no agent-side glob/severity logic. PRESERVE the existing DDD convention-audit grep Commands and the n=4 condition; the merged Commands are ADDED, never replacing the DDD greps.

substep.title: Call goal-create MCP
substep.action: Call the goal-create MCP tool with these parameters:

params.param: Implement {{BC}} domain: aggregates, VOs, events, repo interfaces (≤120 chars — truncate aggregate list if needed)
ACCEPTANCE array from substep 3.14.4e (10-20 items depending on BC conditionals)
CONTEXT string from substep 3.14.4g (purpose + fan-out hints + template refs)

Array of {name,type,paths,commands,pass,fail,condition?} objects built from substep 3.14.4g's investigators (2-4; types from the Reference Table). Omit conditional investigators whose condition is false.

SCOPE array — see the <scope-derivation> rule in the spine <conventions> block. Derive from this BC's domain Deliverables (substep 3.14.4c): emit ["contexts/{{BC}}/src/Domain/**","contexts/previo/src/**"] (the BC's domain layer plus any shared-kernel types this BC owns; add any extra distinct deliverable dirs). A focused single-BC domain footprint lets the gate co-schedule this goal with a DIFFERENT BC's goal under MaxGoals>1.

substep.rule: Description must be ≤120 chars. If BC name + aggregate list exceeds limit, use "Implement {{BC}} domain layer: {{N}} aggregates, VOs, events, interfaces".
max_retries=3 — domain goals have focused scope within a single BC.

check.action: Print error with full context. Continue to next BC (do not abort entire step for one BC failure).
Print: "Domain goal created: goal-{{GOAL_INDEX:03d}} (phase=domain, BC={{BC}}, depends_on=[goal-002]) with {{investigator_count}} investigators, {{task_count}} fan-out tasks, max_retries=3"

substep.title: Report domain goal generation results
substep.action: After all BCs processed, print summary:

check.action: Print warning: "{{bc_count - domain_goal_count}} BC(s) failed goal creation — review errors above."

substep.action: Proceed to Step 3.15 (Application layer goals).
